channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How social media unspooled Luigi Mangione’s life after UnitedHealthcare CEO’s murder
item.description: The murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson last Wednesday sparked a five-day manhunt for the mysterious killer, who left behind irresistible clues like a hidden message on bullet casings and a backpack filled with Monopoly money.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Federal judge slaps down Automattic, granting temporary injunction to WP Engine in ongoing WordPress squabble
item.description: The battle between WordPress owner Automattic and WP Engine seemingly struck US federal Judge Araceli Martinez-Olguin as rather one-sided, as she ruled against Automattic on Tuesday and granted WP Engine the preliminary injunction it sought.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: New approach to Rocky Mountain grizzlies sought ahead of the second Trump presidency
item.description: Environmental groups are asking the U.S. government to do more to protect grizzly bears in Wyoming, Montana and Idaho.
item.dc:creator: Mead Gruver, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Apple Integrates OpenAI's ChatGPT into Devices
item.description: Apple rolls out OpenAI's ChatGPT integration for Siri voice assistant and Writing Tools feature on iPhones, iPads, Mac computers, and more.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: TikTok Challenges Canadian Government's Order to Shut Down Operations
item.description: TikTok challenges Canadian government order over national security concerns, seeks judicial review
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: LangBiTe, la herramienta que detecta prejuicios en desarrollos de IA
item.description: Los modelos de inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa como el popular chatbot de OpenAI, ChatGPT, se entrenan con una gran cantidad de datos que pueden inducir, consciente o inconscientemente, a diferentes sesgos dañinos o discriminatorios en sus respuestas.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cost, security, and flexibility: the business case for open source gen AI
item.description: Travel and expense management company Emburse saw multiple opportunities where it could benefit from gen AI. It could be used to improve the experience for individual users, for example, with smarter analysis of receipts, or help corporate clients by spotting instances of fraud.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Go eclipses Node.js in web API requests, Cloudflare reports
item.description: Go has surpassed Node.js as the most popular language used for making automated API requests, according to cloud provider Cloudflare’s annual review of internet trends.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Why olive oil girl is TikTok’s main character
item.description: If you’ve spent any time on TikTok in the past few days, you’ve probably come across the viral olive oil story. If you haven’t, strap in. The latest trend on the platform sees people sharing their wildest stories over a slideshow of images of Pepe the King Prawn soundtracked to Like A Prayer.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Fortnite players 'tricked' into unwanted purchases are starting to get refunds. Here's how to apply
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — U.S. consumers who were “tricked” into purchases they didn't want from Fortnite maker Epic Games are now starting to receive refund checks, the Federal Trade Commission said this week.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Atmospheric river and potential bomb cyclone will bring messy, dangerous weather to East Coast
item.description: The East Coast is due for a whiplash-inducing rainy, windy and potentially dangerous stretch of weather.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Whittle, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bay Area lawmaker introduces bill requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: “The promise of social media, although real, has turned into a situation where they’re turning our children’s attention into a commodity,” Assemblymember Rebecca Bauer-Kahan, who authored the California bill, said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Kylie Kelce unseats Joe Rogan as top podcast with debut episode
item.description: Kylie Kelce, wife of NFL player-turned-media personality Jason Kelce, beat out Joe Rogan for the top podcast spot on both Apple and Spotify this week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Johnson pours cold water on KOSA push
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) cautioned Republicans against rushing to pass a bill to protect kids and teens online on Tuesday as the GOP prepares to take control of the White House and Congress.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Study: Scientists make more discoveries with help from AI
item.description: A new study by a PhD student at MIT indicates that AI tools can help scientists make more discoveries, according to Nature. In the study by Aidan Toner-Rodgers, an unspecified laboratory in the US with 1,018 researchers used an unspecified custom machine-learning tool.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AT&T to eliminate landlines by 2029
item.description: Telecommunications company AT&T has announced plans to eliminate traditional copper wire-based landline phone service across all of its service areas in the United States over the next five years. The statement was made as part of a presentation to investors.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Social media influencer is a growing career choice. Colleges have noticed
item.description: Have influencers on social media created a new career field worthy of formal education? A growing number of universities are looking at classes and majors aimed at giving influencers the skills needed to spot misinformation, communicate effectively with audiences and understand business contracts t
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, The Hill

item.title: Best Places to Work in IT 2025
item.description: What makes a company a great place to work for IT professionals? Top salaries and benefits certainly help, but those are just table stakes. Tech workers are looking for challenging projects, growth opportunities, and continuous learning in a supportive workplace.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Databricks unveils synthetic data generation API to help evaluate agents faster
item.description: As enterprise demand for building multi-agent systems continues to grow, data infrastructure services providing firm, Databricks, is updating its Mosaic AI Agent Evaluation module with a new synthetic data generation API that will help enterprises evaluate agents faster.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI expands multimodal capabilities with updated text-to-video model
item.description: OpenAI has released a new version of its text-to-video AI model, Sora, for ChatGPT Plus and Pro users, marking another step in expansion into multimodal AI technologies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: China launches anti-monopoly probe into Nvidia amid rising US-China chip tensions
item.description: China has initiated an investigation into Nvidia over alleged violations of the country’s anti-monopoly laws, signaling a potential escalation in the ongoing tech and trade tensions between Beijing and Washington.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NaaS vendor Graphiant launches data assurance service to boost network visibility and compliance
item.description: Graphiant is expanding its network-as-a-service (NaaS) platform today with new data assurance capabilities in a bid to help organizations meet the challenges of data sovereignty and regulatory compliance.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Supply chain compromise of Ultralytics AI library results in trojanized versions
item.description: Attackers have compromised Ultralytics YOLO packages published on PyPI, the official Python package index, by compromising the build environment of the popular library for creating custom machine learning models.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: US approves export of AI chips to UAE amid Microsoft-G42 partnership
item.description: The US government has approved the export of advanced AI chips to a Microsoft-run facility in the United Arab Emirates (UAE), marking a significant step in the tech giant’s partnership with Emirati AI firm G42.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Quick fixes to stop your Windows PC from crashing
item.description: If your Windows PC or laptop is constantly crashing, Kurt the CyberGuy has some easy fixes you can do at home to keep your computer running properly.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Two senators look to reign in big tech’s influence in defense AI, cloud contracts
item.description: The bill would require DoD to use a competitive award process when contracting with cloud, advanced AI systems or data infrastructure vendors. The post Two senators look to reign in big tech’s influence in defense AI, cloud contracts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Don’t scam yourself with the tricks hackers don’t want me to share
item.description: Cybercriminals are tricking people into compromising their own technology by mimicking trusted sources; here's how to keep yourself safe from these "scam-yourself" attacks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What is TypeScript? Strongly typed JavaScript
item.description: Originally developed by Microsoft as a way to adapt JavaScript as a tool to build enterprise-scale applications, TypeScript has become a widely popular programming language that combines JavaScript syntax with strong typing and object-oriented programming.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has banned exports of key materials used to make a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to pro
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, ABC 4
